arduino.command.sendMessageToSerialPort: Arduino: Send Text to Serial Port
arduino.view.container.title: Arduino
arduino.configuration.title: Arduino configuration
arduino.configuration.path.description: Path to the directory containing Arduino CLI. Leave empty if `arduino-cli` is already on your system PATH. Example: 'C:\tools\arduino-cli' for Windows, '/usr/local/bin' for macOS, '/home/$user/bin' for Linux. (Requires a restart after change)
arduino.configuration.commandPath.descri: Executable name or wrapper script relative to `arduino.path`. Leave empty to use the default Arduino CLI executable name for the current platform. Example: 'arduino-cli.exe' for Windows or 'arduino-cli' for macOS/Linux. (Requires a restart after change)
arduino.configuration.theme.description: Theme to apply automatically when starting Arduino work. If the selected theme is missing, the extension offers to install the Arduino Theme Pack.
arduino.configuration.clearOutputOnBuild: Clear the output logs before uploading or verifying.
arduino.configuration.openPDEFiletype.de: Allow VSCode Arduino to open PDE sketches, from pre-1.0.0 versions of Arduino
arduino.configuration.enableUSBDetection: USB Detection is currently not working
arduino.configuration.disableIntelliSens: When disabled vscode-arduino will not auto-generate an IntelliSense configuration (i.e. c_cpp_properties.json) by analyzing the compiler output.
arduino.configuration.defaultTimestampFo: Format of timestamp printed before each line of Serial Monitor output. You can find list of all available placeholders [here](https://github.com/samsonjs/strftime#supported-specifiers).
arduino.configuration.analyzeOnOpen.desc: When true, automatically run analysis when the project is opened. Only works when `arduino.analyzeOnSettingChange` is true.
arduino.configuration.analyzeOnSettingCh: When true, automatically run analysis when board, configuration, or sketch settings are changed.
Custom path for Arduino libraries. Used as an additional library search path when compiling.
arduino.configuration.arduinoCliConfigFi: Path to a local arduino-cli.yaml configuration file. When set, this file is used instead of the global configuration.
